SEARCH
Module com.example.cab302studyslice
Package com.example.cab302studyslice.Model

Class AiAPI.WrappedData

java.lang.Object
com.example.cab302studyslice.Model.AiAPI.WrappedData
Enclosing class:
AiAPI
public static class AiAPI.WrappedData extends Object
Structured data returned by AI session analysis. Contains productivity score, ranking, habits, and session statistics.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    String
    badHabit
    Identified negative habit or distraction
    String
    comparedToSessions
    How this session compares to others ("good" or "bad")
    String
    mostUsedApp
    The most-used application during the session
    int
    ranking
    Ranking of this session among all user sessions (1=best)
    boolean
    recordTotalTime
    Whether this is the longest session recorded
    int
    score
    Overall productivity score (0-100)
    int
    streakCurrent
    Estimated consecutive productive sessions
    int
    totalSessions
    Total number of sessions by the user
